section.subtitle: About Me
section.title: Full Stack Developer passionate about building modern web applications.
section.p1: Full Stack JavaScript Developer based in the Czech Republic, specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript.
section.p2: I have commercial experience developing production web applications, designing REST APIs, implementing business logic, working with PostgreSQL and MongoDB, and deploying applications using Docker and Linux servers.
section.p3: I enjoy solving complex problems, learning new technologies and creating products that deliver real value to users.

page.title: Building modern web applications, from idea to production.
page.lede: I'm Serhii Yemets, a Full Stack JavaScript Developer who enjoys turning complex problems into clean, reliable and maintainable products.
page.p1: Full Stack JavaScript Developer based in the Czech Republic, specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript. I build end-to-end web applications with a strong focus on performance, accessibility and clean architecture.
page.p2: I have commercial experience developing production web applications, designing REST APIs, implementing business logic, working with PostgreSQL and MongoDB, and deploying applications using Docker and Linux servers.
page.p3: I care about the details that make software feel polished — thoughtful interactions, consistent design systems and code that other developers enjoy working with. I'm always learning and looking for the next challenge worth solving.
page.ctaText: Have a project in mind or an open position? I'd love to hear about it.
